features: 【12PCS Care Package for Women Gift Set】Exquisitely wrapped gift box as stress-reducing spa gifts and relaxation gifts for women. Get well gifts for women contains 12 pcs high quality items. It contains:1* 12oz insulation Mug,1*Straw & Straw Brush,1*Fuzzy Socks,1*Silk Eye Mask,1*Silk Headband,1*Scented Candle,1* Bath Bomb,1*Diamond Soap,1* Bath Salt,1*Exquisite Key Chain,1* Sunflower Greeting Card, and 1*Elegant Gift Box.

【Relaxing Self Care Gifts for Her】Treat her to moments of pure serenity with our luxurious relaxation set.The all-natural scented candle, bath bomb, and bath salt will create a quiet rest atmosphere, bringing her a unique bubble bath experience, helping soothe her mind and relax her body.

【Unique Sunflower Gifts for Women】Encourage and uplift with our Sunflower Care Package. Featuring a sunflower cup and a gift box ,Pamper your loved ones with our Unique Spa Gifts Box. Sunflower gifts is not just simple gift boxes for women, it is emotional projections from the heart of the giver, symbols of strong friendship, affection and love.

【Natural & Environmentally Friendly】The scented candle is made of 100% soy wax, bath bomb＆sea salt are made of natural essential oils, the cozy fuzzy socks, the eye mask and headband are light and breathable,guaranteeing a pleasant sleep,and key chain is made of high-quality stainless steel,exquisite, and not easy to break or hard to fade. The 12-oz double wall vacuum insulation stainless steel mug is made of 18/8 food-grade.

【Thoughtful Gift for Any Occasion】Our exquisite spa kit is a popular gift. Whether it's for a birthday, Christmas, or just to show you love and appreciation, this gift box is perfect for any occasion. The perfect gift for your best friend, wife, mother, sister, daughter, coworker or girlfriend.
description: Product Description UNIQUE GIFTSSET FOR WOMEN 12-PC SPA GIFTSSET FOR HER 12OZ VACUUM INSULATED TUMBLER Food-grade Stainless Steel Insulated Tumbler with Double-Wall Design: durable, unbreakable and easy to clean. Designed with a push-in, this portable tumbler mug improves the sealing quality to prevent water from spilling. SOFT FUZZY SOCKS Fuzzy socks crafted from high-quality knit fabrics, Skin-friendly and warm,breathable,elegant & attractive,give her thoughtful care. It will relax your mind and body. · Scented with gorgeous fragrance, perfect for bubble baths and spa experiences at home, bring your special lady a luxurious & sublime bath. EXQUISITE KEY CHAIN · The key chain engrave message:SOMETIMES YOU FORGET YOU'RE AWESOME SO THIS IS YOUR REMINDER · Made from high-quality stainless steel,No Rust, No Allergy, No Fading, No Deformation. FOR WOMEN GIFTS FOR ANY OCCASIONS This is a PERFECT feel better gift, Thinking of You gift, Teacher gifts, Mother's Day gifts, Birthday gifts, Wedding Anniversary gifts, Valentine's Day gifts.....It is beautiful constructed and includes such cute and thoughtful goodies. It's great for all ages. Yon can send it to at least one person in your life.
